css_rules.body: border: 1px solid rgba(126,146,166,.28); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--tc-gap); background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0,1fr) minmax(120px,160px) auto; gap: var(--tc-gap); align-items: end;
margin-top: var(--tc-gap); color: var(--color-muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 700;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0,1fr) minmax(120px,160px) auto; gap: var(--tc-gap); align-items: end;
margin-top: var(--tc-gap); color: var(--color-muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 700;

wastewater-fixture.recommended_action: review; probably obsolete after tc-consumer-row migration

css_rules.body: position: relative; display: grid; gap: var(--tc-gap); padding: var(--tc-gap); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--tc-radius-card); background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);

min-width: 0; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--tc-radius-card); background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: var(--tc-gap); min-height: 52px; padding: var(--tc-gap);
display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0,1fr) 82px 38px; column-gap: var(--tc-gap); align-items: center;

css_rules.selector: /* Phase 35A: module exception cleanup after RC retest. */ .module-view[data-module='drinking-water'] .tc-collection-row.tc-consumer-row--editable, .module-view[data-module='drinking-water'] .dw-consumer-row--editable, .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .wastewater-fixture-row--editable

wastewater-fixture-row.recommended_action: prefer global tc-consumer-row/tc-collection-row; keep only if domain-specific

wastewater-fixtures.recommended_action: replace by tc-consumer-list/tc-stack; remove class from markup if no longer needed

css_rules.body: overflow-x: auto; overscroll-behavior-x: contain; scroll-snap-type: x proximity; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
color: var(--color-muted); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;

selectors.selector: /* Phase 35A: module exception cleanup after RC retest. */ .module-view[data-module='drinking-water'] .tc-collection-row.tc-consumer-row--editable, .module-view[data-module='drinking-water'] .dw-consumer-row--editable, .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .wastewater-fixture-row--editable
/* Phase 36Q.4: wastewater follows global spacing only. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .card, .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .result-card
/* Dynamic update wrappers must be normal block boxes inside stacks. */ [data-ww-dynamic], [data-hx-dynamic], [data-ph-dynamic], [data-buffer-dynamic], [data-platform-dynamic], [data-pipe-dynamic]
/* Wastewater: direct dynamic wrappers inside module columns need the same rhythm as cards. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .span-6 > [data-ww-dynamic]

/* Phase 36Q.5: complete dynamic wrapper display reset */ [data-ww-dynamic="usage"], [data-ww-dynamic="line-fields"], [data-ww-dynamic="fixture-inputs"], [data-ww-dynamic="fixtures"], [data-ww-dynamic="additional-flows"], [data-ww-dynamic="result"]

.wastewater-fixture-row.body: min-width: 0; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--tc-radius-card); background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: var(--tc-gap); min-height: 52px; padding: var(--tc-gap);
